titleStmt.title: SII 8.644: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 644. (A.R. No. 335 of 1903). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME MANDAPA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉni vaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyu
m poṟṟeyappāvaiyum cirttanic celviyu tan
perun tevi yarākiy Inpuṟa neṭutuyar Ūḻiu
l Iṭaituṟai nāṭum tuṭarvanavelippaṭar vanavāciyum
cuḷḷiccūḻmatiḷk koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟkkarumura
l maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭa(l) liḻattaraiyartam muṭi
yum Āṅkavarteviyar roṅkeḻilmuṭiyum munnavarpak
kal tennavar vaitta cunta ramuṭiyum In=ti ranāramum teṇṭi
rai Īḻamaṇṭalam muḻutu meṟipaṭaik keraḷan muṟai
maiyilc cūṭum kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅka
(ṅka)tirmālaiyum caṅkatir ve lperuṅkāva
lp palpaḻan=ti vum ceruviṟṟinavil lirupattorukā(l)laracuka
ḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ melvaruñ cān=ti maṟ ṟivaraṇ kariti Iruttiya ce
mpoṟ ṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻi mika muyaṅkililThis record contains many mistakes in spelling etc.mutu
kiṭṭoḷitta caraciṅka ṉaḷapperumpukaḻoru piṭiyil Iraṭṭa
pāṭi E(ḻ)ḻarai Ilakkamum navanetikkulap perumalaikaḷum vikki
ramavirac cakkarakkoṭṭamum mutir vaṭavalla maturamaṇṭala mum val
kāmiṭai vaḷanakar nāmaṇakkoṇaiyum veñcina vira
paḷḷiyum vārcaṭaippaḻana mācuṇi tecamum Ayarvil vaṇkirtti
yātinakaravaiyil can=ti ran tolkula In=ti raratanai vinai
yamarkkaḷattu kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu pala tanattoṭu
niṟai kulatanakkuvaiyum kiṭṭaru(ma)ñ ceṟimuḷai Oṭṭa
viṣai yamum pūcurar cer nalk kocalaināṭum tanmapāla
nai vemmunai Aḻittu vaṇṭuṟai co
lai taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūranai mura(ṇ)ṇukat
tākkit tikkaṇakirttit takkaṇalāṭamum kovi
n=ta can=ta n māviḻin=to ṭat taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷa
tecamum(t) toṭukaṭalc caṅku koṭṭar mayirpālanai
veñcamarviḷākat tañcivittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yā
naiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittira neṭuṅkaṭal lut
tiralāṭamum veṟimalart tirtta teṟipunaṟ kaṅkaiyum A
laikaṭal naṭuvuḷp pala kalañ celutti caṅkirāma vicai
yottuṅkapanmanākiya kiṭārattaṟaiyanai vākayam poru
kaṭal kumpakkariyoṭum makappaṭut turimaiyiṟ piṟakkiya
peruneti piṟakkamum Ārttavaṉ navanakar porttoḻil
vācalil viccātarattoraṇamum moyttaḷir puṉa
maṇipputavamum kaṉamaṇikkatavum niṟai śrīvicai
yamum tuṟai nīrppaṉmaiyum vanmalaiyūriṟ ke
ṟān malaiyūrum Āḻkaṭalakaḻ cūḻ māyiruṭiṅ
kamum kalaṅkāvalvinai Ilaṅkācokamum kāppuṟuni
ṟaipunal māpappāḷamum kāvalam puricai mevilipaṅkamum viḷaippa
n tūṟuṭai vaḷaippan tūṟum kalaittakkor pukaḻ talaittakko
lamum titamāvalvinai mātamaliṅkamum tarka
ṭun=ti ṟa lilāmuritecamum tenakkavārpoḻil mānak
kavāramum toṭukaṭalkāval kaṭumuraḷk kaṭāramum māp
porutaṇṭār koṇṭa kopparakesa ripaṉmaraā
na Uṭaiyār śrī rājendracoḷade vaṟkku yā
ṇṭu 2 10Āvatu konerinmaikoṇṭān ke
raḷānta kavaḷanāṭṭu Uṟaiyūrkkūṟṟuttu
brahmade yam Aṟiñcikaiccaruppetimaṅ
kalattu sabhai yāṟkkum Ivvūr sthā namuṭaiya Ī
śāna[śiva]bha ṭāranukkum de vakarmmi kaḷukkum Ivvū
r śrī koyil tirumaṟavanīśva rattu Uvaccakkāṇi
munpuṭaiya perun tuṟai Eṭṭi Uḷḷiṭṭāraiyu
m kāḷap paṅku munpuṭaiya niyamatanan Eṟiyān
Uḷḷiṭṭāraiyum tavira naṭṭavaril mārāyan Aiyā
ṟanāna rājendra coḷa nāṭakamārāyanukkum Ivan
vargga ttāṟkkum kuṭuttom . Iraṇṭu kāṇiyum
Ivanvacam viṭṭukkuṭuttuk kal veṭṭikkuṭukka . I
vai Araiyan cun=ta racoḻaṉ Eḻuttu . yāṇṭu 2 10
nāḷ 7 10 8 Ipparicu śrīmukam prasāda mceytaruḷivara
śrīmukattukku prasāda ppaṭṭu kalveṭṭuvittukkuṭu
ttom Ivvūr sabh Aiyomum Isthā namuṭaiya Īśā
naśivabha ṭāranum tevakaṟmikaḷomum . svasti śrī .The record contains many mistakes in spelling.
Digital edition of SII 8.644 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
